'''Swamp Gators''',<ref name="SEMP" /> also known as '''Igua-Jaws''',<ref name="Instructions">{{WebCite|url=https://archive.org/details/super-star-wars-the-empire-strikes-back-usa-rev-1|text=''Super Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back'' Instruction Booklet|work=The Internet Archive|nobackup=1}}</ref> were predators of [[Dagobah/Legends|Dagobah]] with crocodilian-like traits.<ref name="SEMP" />
